Interface IWorkspace

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that have information about the workspace.

[Guid("D4803EE1-79F4-11D0-97FC-0080C7F79481")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IWorkspace

Properties

ConnectionProperties

The connection properties of the workspace.

IPropertySet ConnectionProperties { get; }

Property Value

IPropertySet

IEnumDataset

PathName

The file system full path of the workspace.

string PathName { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Type

The Type of the Workspace.

esriWorkspaceType Type { get; }

Property Value

esriWorkspaceType

Examples

Sample Snippet

WorkspaceFactory

The factory that created the workspace.

IWorkspaceFactory WorkspaceFactory { get; }

Property Value

IWorkspaceFactory

Examples

Sample Snippet

Remarks

<CODE> <P>A WorkspaceFactory is a dispenser of workspaces and allows a client to connect to a workspace specified by a set of connection properties. A workspace represents a database or a datasource that contains one or more datasets. Examples of datasets include tables, feature classes and relationship classes. A WorkspaceFactory is a cocreatable, singleton object. A WorkspaceFactory maintains a pool of currently connected, active workspaces that are being referenced by the application. Connection properties are specified using a PropertySet object and can be saved to a connection file. A WorkspaceFactory also supports methods that can be used to browse and manage file system workspaces, and methods to manage connection files for remote database workspaces.</P></CODE>

Methods

Executes the specified SQL statement.

sqlStmt string
